_doc: Orchestrator per-domain dispatch. Orchestrator faults don't carry a 'UiPath.Orchestrator' exception package — they're discriminated by job State + PendingReason + logon HRESULTs. The trunk routes here when the failing entity is an Orchestrator job with no leaf-level activity exception (job-level fault/pending/stuck). Routes to the orchestrator subtrees.

nodes._reads_from: trunk gather: state, PendingReason/PendingReasons.Errors, logon HRESULT (regex from Info/logs)

when.value: No host is available on the machine template

children.judgment_q: Stuck/Running ProcessOrchestration parent with no own fault? -> cross-system, go to the Maestro traversal.

nodes.reason: Orchestrator job fault not covered by a built subtree (queue-items-failing, foreground-already-running, job-stopped-exit-code, job-stuck single-domain, stale-dispatch). Hand to the LLM loop seeded with the matched playbook from exception-table / orchestrator summary.
